question: The current ratio is calculated as
options: Investors who fund high-risk new businesses in exchange for equity
Current assets ÷ Current liabilities
Functional and project-based management
Competing firms collude to fix prices and limit competition

question: Depreciation refers to
options: Two consecutive quarters of negative GDP growth
Competing firms collude to fix prices and limit competition
Efficiency is doing things right; effectiveness is doing the right things
The reduction in value of an asset over time
answer: The reduction in value of an asset over time

question: A cartel occurs when
options: Competing firms collude to fix prices and limit competition
Rising production costs being passed on to consumers
The cost of producing one additional unit
How long it takes to recover the cost of an investment
answer: Competing firms collude to fix prices and limit competition

question: The difference between efficiency and effectiveness
options: Raise capital by offering new shares to existing shareholders
Efficiency is doing things right; effectiveness is doing the right things
How long it takes to recover the cost of an investment
Rising production costs being passed on to consumers
answer: Efficiency is doing things right; effectiveness is doing the right things

question: Demand-pull inflation is caused by
options: Stock (inventory) from current assets
Competing firms collude to fix prices and limit competition
Excess demand in the economy driving up prices
Efficiency is doing things right; effectiveness is doing the right things
answer: Excess demand in the economy driving up prices

question: A rights issue allows a company to
options: Assess the profitability of an investment in today's money
Two consecutive quarters of negative GDP growth
Raise capital by offering new shares to existing shareholders
Rising production costs being passed on to consumers
answer: Raise capital by offering new shares to existing shareholders

question: The acid test ratio excludes
options: Stock (inventory) from current assets
Functional and project-based management
The cost of producing one additional unit
The reduction in value of an asset over time

question: Cost-push inflation is caused by
options: Rising production costs being passed on to consumers
How long it takes to recover the cost of an investment
Efficiency is doing things right; effectiveness is doing the right things
Competing firms collude to fix prices and limit competition
answer: Rising production costs being passed on to consumers

question: Matrix organisational structure combines
options: Excess demand in the economy driving up prices
The reduction in value of an asset over time
Functional and project-based management
Two consecutive quarters of negative GDP growth

question: Transfer pricing involves
options: Assess the profitability of an investment in today's money
The reduction in value of an asset over time
Multinational companies manipulating internal prices to reduce tax
Competing firms collude to fix prices and limit competition
answer: Multinational companies manipulating internal prices to reduce tax

question: A recession is defined as
options: Investors who fund high-risk new businesses in exchange for equity
The cost of producing one additional unit
Rising production costs being passed on to consumers
Two consecutive quarters of negative GDP growth
answer: Two consecutive quarters of negative GDP growth

question: Marginal cost is
options: Multinational companies manipulating internal prices to reduce tax
The cost of producing one additional unit
The reduction in value of an asset over time
Efficiency is doing things right; effectiveness is doing the right things
answer: The cost of producing one additional unit

question: The payback period measures
options: Efficiency is doing things right; effectiveness is doing the right things
Competing firms collude to fix prices and limit competition
Rising production costs being passed on to consumers
How long it takes to recover the cost of an investment
answer: How long it takes to recover the cost of an investment

question: Net present value (NPV) is used to
options: Excess demand in the economy driving up prices
Two consecutive quarters of negative GDP growth
Raise capital by offering new shares to existing shareholders
Assess the profitability of an investment in today's money
answer: Assess the profitability of an investment in today's money

question: Venture capital is provided by
options: Excess demand in the economy driving up prices
How long it takes to recover the cost of an investment
Investors who fund high-risk new businesses in exchange for equity
Current assets ÷ Current liabilities
answer: Investors who fund high-risk new businesses in exchange for equity
